description_long: This is a tall, post-mounted lantern with a robust wooden column rising from a stone base, topped by a classic lantern housing. The lantern head features a metal frame with a pyramidal roof and open sides, likely designed to hold a light source. Extending horizontally from the post is a sturdy wooden arm, supported by black metal brackets, from which hangs a weathered, rectangular sign with tattered edges and faint, rustic writing. The base is constructed from interlocking stone blocks, providing stability and a sense of permanence. The wood is dark and polished, contrasting with the matte black metal fittings and the rough, aged appearance of the hanging sign. This lantern would be well-suited for placement along cobblestone streets, in parks, or at the entrance to a historic district.
description: A tall, post-mounted lantern with a stone base, wooden column, metal lantern head, and a hanging rustic sign. The design combines wood, metal, and stone for a classic, old-world urban look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the lantern head, wooden post, stone base, and the hanging sign with visible text.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the post, the supporting metal brackets, and the profile of the hanging sign.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the back of the lantern head, the arm, and the reverse side of the sign.
description_view_3: Direct rear view focusing on the post, stone base, and the back of the lantern structure without the sign visible.
